inputs.text: Main toh bahut tezi se bukhar ho gayi hai, sir bhi dard kar raha hai

hypotheses.label: Chikungunya
hypotheses.rationale: Acute onset of high fever and severe headache

hypotheses.label: Viral fever
hypotheses.rationale: Sudden high fever and headache are common in viral fever

hypotheses.label: Dengue

inputs.text: Ab toh aankhon ke peeche dard ho raha hai, haddiyan toot rahi hain, bukhar abhi bhi hai

hypotheses.label: Chikungunya
hypotheses.rationale: Retro-orbital pain and bone pain are characteristic of Chikungunya

hypotheses.label: Dengue
hypotheses.rationale: Dengue can also present with retro-orbital pain and bone pain, making it a possible diagnosis

hypotheses.label: Viral fever
hypotheses.rationale: Viral fever is less likely given the specific nature of the symptoms

inputs.text: Bukhar kam ho gayi hai, lal daane nikal aaye hain, aur masoodon se khoon aa raha hai

hypotheses.label: Dengue
hypotheses.rationale: The appearance of rash, decrease in fever, and bleeding gums are cardinal signs that confirm Dengue

hypotheses.label: Viral fever
hypotheses.rationale: Viral fever does not typically present with these specific signs

hypotheses.label: Malaria
hypotheses.rationale: Malaria can cause fever and other symptoms, but the presence of rash and bleeding gums points more towards Dengue

inputs.text: Main toh abhi bhi bahut kamzor hoon, aur pet mein dard ho raha hai

hypotheses.label: Dengue
hypotheses.rationale: The patient's symptoms and signs are consistent with Dengue, and the presence of a distended abdomen could indicate hemorrhagic complications

hypotheses.label: Viral fever
hypotheses.rationale: Ruled out due to the specific progression of symptoms and signs

hypotheses.label: Malaria
hypotheses.rationale: Ruled out as the clinical presentation does not align with malaria
